headline: Ford, Applied Digital, U Power, Block And Alphabet: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
summary: U.S. stock markets experienced a significant surge on Wednesday, following a mixed close the previous day. The futures of major benchmark indices climbed as President Donald Trump declared a two-week ceasefire on Iran strikes. The Dow Jones Industrial Average surged 2.85% to 47,909.92, while the S&P 500 climbed 2.5% to 6,782.81 and the Nasdaq advanced 2.8% to 22,634.99. These are the top stocks that gained the attention of retail traders and investors through the day. Ford Motor Company (NYSE:F)

headline: SOFI's Valuation Reflects Growth Expectations but Raises Questions

headline: INTU's FedNow Integration: Will It Strengthen Its Competitive Edge?
summary: INTU joins FedNow, enabling instant payments across its platform, cutting wait times and boosting cash flow efficiency for businesses and consumers.

headline: Birch Coffee Expands New York City Footprint with Square as Its Commerce Foundation
summary: DISTRIBUTED LOCATION/OAKLAND, Calif., April 10, 2026--Birch Coffee, one of New York City’s most beloved independent coffee brands, has opened its twelfth location powered by Square’s unified commerce platform. Built on a hospitality-first ethos and a commitment to driving neighborhood connection, Birch Coffee is steadily scaling by leveraging Square to simplify operations, empower frontline teams, and deliver a consistent customer experience at every location.
